_meta.source: typewise.app homepage + customer-stories pages, re-verified line by line on 2026-06-12
_meta.warning: Typewise advertises '200+ deep integrations' but does not publish a full list publicly. Confirmed entries are backed by a named public source; everything else is covered only by the 200+ claim and must be validated on a sales call.

salesforce.evidence: Named in the Brack.ch customer story as one of the systems Typewise integrates with

servicenow.evidence: Named in the Brack.ch customer story as one of the systems Typewise integrates with

genesys.evidence: Named in the Brack.ch customer story as one of the systems Typewise integrates with

bsi.evidence: Named in the Brack.ch customer story; a BSI Software press release documents Brack.ch/Competec running BSI CRM

channels_native.voice: listed as a channel on the typewise.app homepage
channels_native.chatgpt: listed as a CHANNEL on the homepage — Typewise's agentic-commerce positioning (be present where buyers' AI assistants act), not an LLM-provider statement
channels_native.claude: listed as a CHANNEL on the homepage — same agentic-commerce positioning

microsoft_dynamics_365.evidence: Covered only by Typewise's public '200+ integrations' claim — no named public evidence. Verify directly.

freshdesk.evidence: Covered only by the '200+ integrations' claim. Note: Typewise blog content treats Freshdesk as a competitor/alternative, not as a documented integration.

hubspot_service_hub.evidence: Covered only by the '200+ integrations' claim — no named public evidence. Verify directly.

slack.evidence: Covered only by the '200+ integrations' claim — no named public evidence.

microsoft_teams.evidence: Covered only by the '200+ integrations' claim — no named public evidence.

not_supported_or_unknown.zendesk: No public evidence of a native integration. Typewise's own blog treats Zendesk AI as a competitor ('If your organization already relies on Zendesk... Zendesk AI is a logical upgrade'). Ask Typewise directly before assuming compatibility.
not_supported_or_unknown.intercom: Direct competitor (Fin). No public evidence of co-existence as an integration.
not_supported_or_unknown.discord: Not advertised. Outside typical enterprise CS scope.
not_supported_or_unknown.telegram_business: Not advertised on homepage. Verify with sales.
